headline: The context behind better code
snippet: Coding agents can read code. Unblocked gives them the history, decisions, and conventions behind it so they generate mergeable code without the back-and-forth. Coding agents rarely produce mergeable c
full_text: Coding agents can read code. Unblocked gives them the history, decisions, and conventions behind it so they generate mergeable code without the back-and-forth. Coding agents rarely produce mergeable code on the first try. Even with rules, skills, and MCP connections, you still end up babysitting each session, supplying missing context, fixing wrong assumptions, and burning tokens. Without context, agents generate implementations that break patterns, miss dependencies, and fail tests. Unblocked gives them the decisions and conventions your codebase depends on. Without context, agents search broadly and burn tokens on dead ends. Unblocked gives them the right information up front so they use fewer tokens to complete the same task. Without context, engineers spend time correcting agent output. With Unblocked, the first implementation is much closer to what actually ships. Bring the power of Unblocked's decision-grade context to your coding agents or internal tools with simple-to-connect i...
